title: Ulig Abaha Ltd.
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Ulig Abaha Limited''' or '''Ulig Abaha Ltd.''' was a company that specialized in the production of small [[Starship/Legends|starships]]. The company was headquartered in the [[Corporate Sector/Legends|Corporate Sector]], and its products included the [[2 Warpod|#2 Warpod]] and the [[Dimel assault ship|''Dimel''-class assault ship]].

{{Company-stub}}
